preferences.title: User Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Configure your application settings and API keys
preferences.preferences_tab_subtitle: Configure regional, appearance, and experimental behavior.
preferences.integration_tab_subtitle: Manage API keys and external service integrations.
preferences.integration_section_help: Manage API keys for map providers, transcription, and translation services.
preferences.timezone_help: Used for satellite pass times and scheduling displays.
preferences.stadia_api_help: Used for map tile providers that require an API token.
preferences.theme_help: Theme change is applied after saving and page reload.
preferences.theme_reload_required: Theme will be applied after saving and reloading.
preferences.celestial_page_help: Show or hide the Celestial page while it is under development.
preferences.locale_help: Controls date and number formatting in the UI.
preferences.gemini_api_key_help: Google Gemini API key for audio transcription. Get yours at ai.google.dev.
preferences.gemini_privacy_text: When enabled, audio is sent to Google servers. You are responsible for associated usage costs.
preferences.gemini_terms_link_aria: Open Gemini Terms in a new tab
preferences.deepgram_api_key_help: Deepgram API key for audio transcription. Get yours at deepgram.com.
preferences.deepgram_privacy_text: When enabled, audio is sent to Deepgram servers. You are responsible for associated usage costs.
preferences.deepgram_pricing_link_aria: Open Deepgram pricing in a new tab
preferences.google_translate_api_key_help: Google Cloud Translation API key for translating Deepgram transcriptions.
preferences.google_translate_privacy_text: Used for translation of transcript text through Google Cloud Translation.
preferences.google_translate_pricing_link_aria: Open Google Translate pricing in a new tab
preferences.privacy_notice_link_aria: Open privacy notice in a new tab

location.title: Select location on map
location.subtitle: Use the map below to set the ground station location
location.failed_get_location: Failed to get your current location
location.geolocation_not_supported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Maintenance related functions

tabs.frontend_state_subtitle: Local storage and persisted client state
tabs.message_log_subtitle: Realtime event stream and console output

maintenance.danger_zone_subtitle: Actions in this area may modify or remove system state. Proceed carefully.
maintenance.service_control_subtitle: Restart or shutdown the entire Ground Station service
maintenance.restart_service_description: Restarts all processes including SDR, tracker, and web server. All connections will be dropped.
maintenance.confirm_restart_message: This will restart the entire Ground Station service, including:
maintenance.restart_item_1: All SDR sessions will be terminated
maintenance.restart_item_4: All WebSocket connections will be dropped
maintenance.confirm_restart_question: Are you sure you want to proceed?
maintenance.deployment_docker: Docker deployment: The service will automatically restart after shutdown.
maintenance.deployment_standalone: Standalone/Development deployment: The service will only shutdown and must be manually restarted.
maintenance.browser_features_subtitle: Test browser compatibility for advanced features used in the waterfall display
maintenance.canvas_transfer_description: Required for transferring canvas to workers
maintenance.offscreen_in_worker_description: Tests creating OffscreenCanvas inside a worker
maintenance.canvas_transfer_worker_description: Tests transferring canvas control to a worker
maintenance.all_features_message: Your browser supports all the features needed for optimal waterfall display performance.
maintenance.missing_features_message: Your browser does not support all features needed for optimal waterfall display performance. The waterfall may still work but with reduced performance or functionality.
maintenance.time_drift_subtitle: Compares browser time against backend server time using request midpoint estimation.
